description_long: This is a set of four connected, upright metal lockers, each with a rectangular door and ventilation slats near the top and bottom. The lockers are painted a weathered, chipped red, with visible rust and grime, giving them a distressed, industrial appearance. One of the locker doors is open, revealing a dark, empty interior with two shelves and a sticker on the inside. The exterior features stickers, labels, and graffiti, adding to the urban, well-used look. The lockers are mounted on a circular, tiled platform that mimics a concrete or stone surface. The overall design suggests these lockers are commonly found in public spaces such as gyms, schools, or industrial facilities.
description: A weathered, red metal locker set with four doors, one open to reveal shelves inside, covered in rust, stickers, and graffiti.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four locker doors, with one door open revealing interior shelves and stickers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lockers and the open door extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, rusted red metal backs of the lockers with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the closed locker sides and the open door protruding forward.
